item.title: The Onion officially owns InfoWars
item.description: It has been a long time in the works, but InfoWars, the fake news outlet long ran by professional hatemonger Alex Jones is officially part of The Onion. (https://theonion.info) It will be overseen by new Creative Director Tim Heidecker.
item.dc:creator: smashpro1

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: InfoWars has been acquired by the Onion
item.description: In a deal originally scuttled at the end of '24 after a Trump judge blocked it. The Onion finally owns Alex Jones's InfoWars and has announced Tim Heidecker (Tim and Eric) as it's new creative head and changed the Logo to rainbow colored. Announcement video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldWnJ_LFJUI
item.dc:creator: Kalli

item.title: The actually did it!
item.description: The Onion bought Infowars with money and help from the Sandy Hook families. Even cooler… they named Spagett as the creative director!
item.dc:creator: bendistraw

item.title: She did not advance
item.description: Sophie Powers delivers a bold and humorous audition performance of her song “ST*U” during American Idol 2025 – Season 23, Episode 3 (Auditions Week 3). She was never a serious contestant, the producers chose her because they knew of her as a quirky artist. Oh and she's Canadian. I'm just posting because i like the song.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: U.S. Military veterans are occupying the Cannon building in the nation’s Capitol to protest the US’s war on Iran and Israel’s genocide on Gaza.
item.description: Protesting war and genocide lands you in jail while supporting war and funding genocide gets you a job in Congress and the White House.
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1674 (six foot turkey)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Kea love to chew up cars.
The kokako may or may not be extinct.
Goddammit, the politicians in my state are morons.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Yesterday russia declared the fire at Tuapse oil terminal extinguished. Ukraine: Well let's make a new one then! Even a bigger one!

item.title: Monday Video Dump that killed the Radio Dump Star.
item.description:
Kazuhito Yamashita. Women must love him.
Now Nintendo Lawyers will go after you!
EDIT: Monday Frontpage again! Thank you very much, imgurians! I do some reviews as a hobby, and today I finally checked out 'Mario Galaxy the Movie'! You can see the review here https://youtu.be/LIaj21D29_Q
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: A tribute to the men who inspired me to learn.
item.description: I was fortunate to grow up in a time where wise and compassionate men got to share their love of the world with young minds around the world. Fractal, design, and laser work by me. Edit: Appreciate the love, everyone! I don't have these available online, but if you really want one you can DM me, or email me at admin@complicatedreality.com.
item.dc:creator: gameryamen

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Unexpected guests ... for both groups
item.description: *tournament From post https://www.instagram.com/p/DXHjU8ChfmP/ A tornado warning forced a wedding to evacuate into a gym during a volleyball tournament but instead of panic, strangers came together, shared joy, and celebrated with the happy couple. ♥️ vishapatel1 Hi hello this is my wedding! The comments, the kindness, the whole thing - thank you all ? I feel like I get to relive with my wedding everyday. The greatest gift - i love humanity!!!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Malicious Compliance
item.description: My local bank was bought out by a bigger bank. New corporate said they had to have a lock on the door between the lobby and the back offices. So they put a lock on the door. And when you ask if it's cool to use the bathroom, they say, "Sure, just reach over the door to open it from the back." Beautiful. 10/10. No notes.
item.dc:creator: ColleenMarie
